# This is not a normal RevOps role.*Created: Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 1:53:56?PM*<div><b><span style="font-size: 18px">This is not a normal RevOps role.</span></b><span style="font-size: 18px"><br></span></div>

<div><h2><br></h2></div>
<div><b>About the job</b></div>
<div><b>About The Job</b>At Go Nimbly, we want to be a global thought leader in the RevOps space by developing a badass brand built through innovative work created by individuals with growth mindsets. As a member of the Delivery team, you will help our clients drive more revenue by creating a buying experience thatŐs both frictionless and human. You will move these high-growth companies towards a more operationally efficient organization.As a <b>RevOps Architect</b>, you'll lead the end-to-end design of revenue systems and data flows across the GTM stack. YouŐll own discovery, architecture, and rollout plansŃand be accountable for measurable business outcomes. For this opening, we are looking for someone with hands-on expertise in Clay and its integrations.</div>
<ul>
<li>Remote: Location Requirements</li>
</ul>
<div>WeŐre a fully remote company. At this time, we are only able to hire candidates who reside in the following locations due to payroll, tax, and compliance requirements:<b>U.S. states:</b> California, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Massachusetts, New Hampshire, New York, North Carolina, Oregon, Pennsylvania, Texas, Utah.<b>Countries:</b> Argentina, Colombia, Uruguay, Mexico, Brazil<b>On a given day, a RevOps Architect will spend time:</b><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Guiding executives and stakeholders by presenting options, discerning trade-offs, and making clear architectural recommendations tied to KPIs. </li>
<li>Documenting reference architectures, requirements, and phased workstream plans across Clay and broader RevOps tech stack. </li>
<li>Designing Clay workflows for programmatic prospecting, enrichment orchestration, and signal-based scoring/routing into Salesforce/HubSpot. </li>
<li>Contributing to Go NimblyŐs internal knowledge-base and provide mentorship to consultants and analysts. </li>
<li>Managing senior client relationships; facilitating workshops and decision forums. </li>
</ul>
<div><b>WhatŐs in it for you?</b><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Flexible working environment: our entire team works remotely, and we have no plans to change this!</li>
<li>Tiered incentive program (in addition to base salary) to reward high performers. </li>
<li>Gain exposure to several high-growth companies looking to scale and invest in their revenue operations function. </li>
<li>Be a part of a dynamic team and collaborate with top industry professionals. Many of our alumni have gone on to become leaders and executives at high-growth companies!</li>
<li>Annual camp: we have a yearly offsite to bring the team together, celebrate our successes, and plan the year. </li>
<li>Dedicated to employee development and career paths aimed at fostering your growth and your career. </li>
<li>100% paid premiums for US employeesŐ insurance coverage. </li>
</ul>
<div><b>About You</b><br></div>
<ul>
<li>10+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/Marketing Ops with 5+ years consulting or ownership of multi-system architecture in high-growth B2B. </li>
<li>Hands-on proficiency in Clay for automating prospecting workflows, data enrichment, web scraping, AI/LLM fields, and lead qualification at scale. </li>
<li>Experience integrating Clay with Salesforce &amp HubSpot (object model, flows/automation, dedupe/routing, validation rules); experience with webhooks/APIs/middleware. </li>
<li>Ability to create and optimize data workflows and data contracts using ClayŐs enrichment APIs and normalization rules; enforce governance and observability (usage, error handling, data drift alerts). </li>
<li>Understanding of data hygiene and normalization best practices within Clay; proven playbooks to operationalize enriched data across GTM processes (scoring, routing, attribution, sequences). </li>
<li>You display deep technical expertise and are a SME in more than one RevOps domain (e.g., lead management, attribution, lifecycle) and can dive deep in adjacent tools. </li>
<li>Experience with configuration of Salesforce (declarative + design for scale; Apex familiarity a plus) and working knowledge of MAPs (HubSpot/Marketo/Pardot). </li>
<li>Serious organization and program/project management skills; you drive clarity, cadence, and decision logs. </li>
<li>A great presenter who builds strong relationships and can influence at the executive level. </li>
<li>High attention to quality and detail; you instrument outcomes and iterate based on data. </li>
</ul>
<div><b>About Us</b><br></div>
<ul>
<li>We pride ourselves in creating the worldŐs best revenue operators at Go Nimbly!</li>
<li>We are positive people who have a sense of urgency, creativity, and decisiveness coupled with the willingness to work hard and well under pressure. </li>
<li>We care about self-betterment and believe in pushing each other to reach our fullest abilities. </li>
<li>We are ambassadors of Go Nimbly and actively engage within the Revenue Operations space. </li>
</ul>
<div><b>WhatŐs next?</b>Apply! Rest assured, while AI might feel like itŐs taking over the world, we have a human on the other end of the computer personally reviewing each application. Our Talent Acquisition team will reach out if weŐd like to speak further about the role. And if not, we promise to let you know because letŐs be honest, who enjoys being ghosted when applying for a job? Not only are we committed to getting back to you but we also provide clear feedback.During the first call with our Talent team, we will lay out the steps in the interview process since itŐs unique to each role but typically includes a couple of rounds. We value your time and ours, so we plan to make the best use of our interviews to learn if we are a good fit for you and vice versa.The base salary for this role is $140,000 - $160,000 USD. Adjustment based on geographical location and final salary decision will be in accordance with leveling. In addition to a base salary, this role is eligible for a performance bonus plan.</div>
<div><br></div>

<div><b><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Go Nimbly</b><b><br></b></div>

<div><b><h2><br></h2></b></div>
<div><b>Following</b></div>
<div>Technology, Information and Internet 51-200 employees 116 on LinkedIn</div>
<div>Go Nimbly is a Revenue Operations (RevOps) consultancy, helping mid-market and enterprise-level SaaS companies identify and solve the challenges getting in the way of growth and revenue goals. <br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Our flexible RevOps solutions are designed to help your team optimize revenue processes and achieve scalable growth, and we are experts at managing complex, cross-functional projects and driving impactful, org-wide change. <br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>With deep SaaS and RevTech expertise, we help teams meet rising customer expectations by delivering scalable solutions and leveraging AI to drive efficiency, while preserving the human touch that drives GTM success.</div>
